description_long: This is a large, three-tiered cake with a golden-brown sponge base and thick, white icing dripping over the edges of each tier. The icing is decorated with a marbled pink pattern, giving it a unique and artistic appearance. Each tier is topped with evenly spaced swirls of piped cream and small, round, purple decorations that resemble candies or berries. The cake's surface has a slightly matte texture, and the tiers are perfectly stacked, creating a classic, celebratory look. There are no candles or additional toppers present, and the cake sits directly on a flat surface without a visible stand or plate. The overall design is festive and eye-catching, suitable for large gatherings or public celebrations.
description: A three-tiered, golden-brown cake with marbled white icing, piped cream swirls, and purple candy decorations, arranged in a festive and artistic style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marbled icing, cream swirls, and purple candies, with the left side of the bottom tier featuring a darker icing patch.
description_view_1: This view highlights the symmetry of the decorations and the even spacing of the cream swirls and purple candies on all tiers.
description_view_2: The right side reveals more of the marbled icing pattern and a prominent dark icing patch on the middle tier.
description_view_3: This angle shows the back of the cake, with the decorations and marbled icing continuing uniformly around all tiers.
